title: Grammitis micropecten
taxonomy: Grammitis micropecten is classified within the family Polypodiaceae. This family consists of various species of ferns, commonly known as polypody ferns. The genus Grammitis is further divided into several species, with Grammitis micropecten being one of them. It belongs to the order Polypodiales and is native to tropical regions. Grammitis micropecten is a type of epiphytic fern that grows on other plants for support.

intro: Grammitis micropecten, also known as micro-pecten polypody or Polypodium micropecten, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it beneficial for cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Grammitis micropecten include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. Grammitis micropecten is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including hypertension and respiratory disorders.
